creator: kbowling@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Seth from comment #2)
Will MacKay contacted me about another issue, the pid file conflicting with the GUI client, and was able to explain the issue you are having in a way I could understand.. the daemon program and bitcoind were creating the pid file with different users.  I committed your suggested fix above, can you test and report back if it is still not working?
